_comment: Cool instrument × fire × fate. Archetypes keyed by top-1/top-2 dims; mutation has multiple variants per level, picked deterministically from the vector. Placeholders: {sign} {dominant} {missing} {element} {dim} {dimU} {dimB}.

archetypes.name: The Ignition
archetypes.blurb: One spark, and the orbit's already lit.

archetypes.name: The Pulse
archetypes.blurb: Sparks fly; drive and idea on one frequency.

archetypes.name: The Spearhead
archetypes.blurb: Drive, forged into guidance—straight to target.

archetypes.name: The Ember Core
archetypes.blurb: The core stays burning. It never cuts out.

archetypes.name: The Bedrock
archetypes.blurb: Brick by brick, stacking time into certainty.

archetypes.name: The Anchor
archetypes.blurb: Steady all the way down to tender roots.

archetypes.name: The Load-Bearer
archetypes.blurb: A ton bears down; he doesn't move.

archetypes.name: The Matrix
archetypes.blurb: Clear logic, deployed to array the imagination.

archetypes.name: The Frequency
archetypes.blurb: Always tuned to the next frequency.

archetypes.name: The Tideweaver
archetypes.blurb: Weaving feeling into a net that glows.

archetypes.name: The Regulator
archetypes.blurb: However the tide surges, the reading holds.

archetypes.name: The Abyss
archetypes.blurb: Still on the surface—an ocean underneath.

archetypes.name: The Flashpoint
archetypes.blurb: Steps into the light and ignites the room.

archetypes.name: The Keystone
archetypes.blurb: Everything in place, then he calibrates to zero.

archetypes.name: The Calibrator
archetypes.blurb: Zero tolerance for drift—his own included.

typical: Match confirmed: you trace the {sign} baseline almost exactly. The chart called it.
Calibrated: still on the orbit {sign} drew for you—it knows you, and you know it.
micro: Minor drift detected: still mostly {sign}, but a few edges the chart can't predict now—those, you ground yourself.
A hairline in the trajectory: you haven't left {sign}, you've just started marking your own scale on its edge.
The deviation hovers at the threshold—{sign} still holds most of you, but one piece answers only to you.
notable: Marked drift: you've stepped off the script {sign} wrote. This fork isn't an error—it's a fate you walked into.
Reading confirmed: long gone from the orbit your sign assigned. The chart concedes—you went further than it dared.
The divergence is set: {sign} was your start, not your sentence. The rest of the road, you lit yourself.
extreme: Radical drift: you've all but rewritten {sign}. The chart fails before you—who you are is fixed by every step you took.
Off the scale: this isn't {sign} anymore—it's you. Fate didn't abandon you; you seized the pen.
Baseline at zero: no sign can contain you. You've burned into your own coordinate—forged, all of it, on the way.

matchReasons.ideal: a close match to the ideal you set

personality: {archetype}: led by {dominant}, with {missing} near silent—this is you read from the data, not platitudes.
matchSummary: With your real personality on the table, these read closest to you.
